Enterprise Architecture

Production-Grade Terragrunt & Infrastructure Platform

Environments Layer

🧪
dev/eu-central-1 Sandbox with Spot instance optimization (-85% cost).
🛡️
prod/eu-central-1 HA production cluster with manual approval gate.
🧬
_envcommon/ Shared DRY inheritance layer. 100% config reuse.

Governance & Policy

🛡️
OIDC Keyless Auth Zero long-lived secrets. GitHub Actions trust-based identity.
⚖️
OPA / Conftest Custom Rego laws: mandatory tags, no legacy t2.* instances.
💰
Infracost Gate Automated cost impact per PR before reaching production.

repo-root/

  • .github/ # Platform CI
    • actions/
      • setup-platform/ # OIDC + AWS auth
      • static-analysis/ # TFLint, Trivy, Checkov
    • docker/
      • Dockerfile # Toolchain image
    • workflows/
      • terragrunt.yml # Main CI/CD
      • reusable-terragrunt.yml
      • drift-detection.yml # Nightly
      • destroy.yml
      • publish-toolchain.yml
  • infrastructure-bootstrap/ # Day-0
    • OIDC role, S3 state, DynamoDB lock
  • infrastructure-modules/ # Blueprints
    • network/vpc/
    • compute/eks/
  • infrastructure-live/ # Deliverables
    • root.hcl # Global config
    • _envcommon/ # DRY Hub
    • dev/eu-central-1/
      • network/vpc/ terragrunt.hcl
      • compute/eks/ terragrunt.hcl
    • prod/eu-central-1/
      • network/vpc/ terragrunt.hcl
      • compute/eks/ terragrunt.hcl
    • scripts/ # smoke-test, generate-module
  • policies/terraform/ # OPA Rego
  • renovate.json # Zero-touch deps

Module Library

🌐
network/vpc Hardened VPC: NACL Deny-All, Black-Hole SG, Flow Logs.
☸️
compute/eks EKS with KMS secrets encryption and full audit logging.
🔌
Wrapped Modules Official AWS modules with mandatory org tags enforced.

CI/CD Automation

🚀
Parallel Planning Multi-env matrix: dev & prod planned simultaneously.
✅
Sequential Apply Dependency-aware apply using run --all.
🔍
Nightly Drift Detection Self-healing: auto-creates and closes GitHub Issues on drift.
🤖
Renovate Automation Zero-touch dependency updates for HCL, Actions, Dockerfile.
OK-INFRASTRUCTURE-ENGINEERING © 2026
